---
title: Shrinkage
jupyter: python3
---



### Set up and get data

```{python}
## Import modules
import os
import abct
import numpy as np
from scipy import io
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.subplots as sp

## Unpack data
data = io.loadmat(os.path.join(".", "data", "hcp_data.mat"))
connectivity = data["connectivity"]
activity = data["activity"]
distance = data["distance"]
coactivity = activity.T @ activity

k = 5           # Number of components 
repl = 100      # Number of replicates
```

### Shrinkage of structural networks

```{python}
n = len(connectivity)
ix = np.eye(n, dtype=bool)

D = distance**(-1)
D[ix] = 0

D1 = abct.residualn(D, "soft")

print(np.corrcoef(connectivity[~ix], D[~ix])[0, 1])

print(np.corrcoef(connectivity[~ix], D1[~ix])[0, 1])
```
